title: Stream inventory drift: 23 streams in code vs 19 in monitoring doc
evidence: shared/types/src/events.ts declares 23 streams. Missing from inventory: stream:system-failures, stream:system-control, stream:system-scaling, stream:service-degradation, stream:dlq-alerts
expected: Monitoring inventory should list all 23 streams
actual: Inventory lists 19 streams, missing 4 self-healing + 1 degradation stream
recommendation: Update monitoring skill System Inventory to include all 23 declared streams

title: Feature flag count drift: 22 flags in code vs 16 in monitoring doc
evidence: shared/config/src/feature-flags.ts declares 22 FEATURE_FLAGS properties. New flags since doc: FEATURE_SOLANA_EXECUTION, FEATURE_STATISTICAL_ARB, FEATURE_MEV_SHARE, FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_RISK_SCORING, FEATURE_TIMEBOOST, FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2, FEATURE_COW_BACKRUN
recommendation: Update monitoring doc feature flag list to 22 and document new flags in .env.example

title: All service source files use RedisStreams constants — no hardcoded stream names
evidence: Grep of services/ and shared/ for hardcoded stream names returned only test files (excluded) and events.ts canonical definitions. Publishers use RedisStreamsClient.STREAMS.* or imported RedisStreams constants
expected: No hardcoded stream names in non-test source

title: All 5 expected consumer groups found in code
evidence: coordinator-group (coordinator/src/), cross-chain-detector-group (cross-chain-detector/src/), execution-engine-group (execution-engine/src/), execution-engine (fast-lane consumer), mempool-detector-group (mempool-detector/src/)

title: MAXLEN enforced via xaddWithLimit() abstraction with STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS config
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts:399 — STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS covers all 23 streams. xaddWithLimit() at line 697 auto-applies MAXLEN. Health reporter and whale publisher use xaddWithLimit.
actual: PASS — xaddWithLimit abstraction enforces MAXLEN automatically. Stream lag monitoring at 80% threshold (line 933).

title: XACK properly implemented in all consumer abstractions
evidence: StreamConsumer class handles xack. Coordinator stream-consumer-manager.test.ts verifies xack calls. Cross-chain detector, execution engine, and test helpers all have xack patterns.
expected: All consumer group readers ACK messages
actual: PASS — xack present in all consumer code paths

title: No || 0 anti-pattern in source code — only in test files
evidence: Grep for '|| 0' in .ts files found 9 occurrences, ALL in test files (cross-chain-simulator.test.ts, warming-flow.test.ts, tier3-optimizations.test.ts, websocket-resilience.test.ts, token-config-solana-validation.test.ts, regression-deep-dive.test.ts)

title: HMAC signing properly configured with production enforcement
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY documented in .env.example:461. Production enforcement at streams.ts:456. Key rotation via STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS documented at .env.example:465. Legacy signature compat flag available.

title: Feature flag cross-dependencies validated at startup
evidence: feature-flags.ts:653 validates SIGNAL_CACHE_READ requires ML_SIGNAL_SCORING. Line 664 validates ML_SIGNAL_SCORING recommends MOMENTUM_TRACKING. Line 744 validates SOLANA_EXECUTION requires SOLANA_RPC_URL.
actual: PASS — validation runs at module load with proper opt-out for tests

title: Risk configuration fully validated with production safeguards
evidence: risk-config.ts:270 requires RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL in production. Line 328 cross-validates defaultWinProbability >= minWinProbability. All parameters bounded with parseEnvFloat/parseEnvInt.
actual: PASS — comprehensive validation with bounds checking

title: Several service-specific env vars undocumented in .env.example
evidence: CAN_BECOME_LEADER, INSTANCE_ROLE, LEADER_LOCK_KEY, COORDINATOR_PORT, MAX_OPPORTUNITIES, OPPORTUNITY_TTL_MS, OPPORTUNITY_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS, PAIR_TTL_MS, MAX_ACTIVE_PAIRS, ALERT_COOLDOWN_MS, EXECUTION_CB_THRESHOLD, EXECUTION_CB_RESET_MS, MONOLITH_HEALTH_PORT, MONOLITH_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS, MONOLITH_REDIS_URL, PRICE_MATRIX_SLOTS, WS_WORKER_PARSING, EXECUTION_HYBRID_MODE used in source but not fully documented
actual: ~18 env vars used in services but not in .env.example
recommendation: Add missing env vars to .env.example with descriptions and defaults

title: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS vs STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS naming inconsistency
evidence: .env.example line 465 uses STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS. streams.ts:1524 uses process.env.STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS (matches). hmac-utils.ts does not reference previous key. All consistent.
expected: Consistent naming across code and docs
recommendation: None — was initially flagged but verified consistent
